titleStmt.title: SII 25.175: original edition by M. D. Sampath
No. 175. (A.R. No. 175 of 1908.) TIRUNAṞAIYŪR, KUMBAKONAM TALUK, THANJAVUR DISTRICT.

summary.p: North wall of the maṇḍapa in front of the central shrine in the Siddhanāthasvāmi temple.
The details of the date of the record viz., year 2, Miṉa, śu 1, Thursday and Uttiraṭṭādi correspond to 1180 A.D., February 28.

It records the gift of gold by Nārāyaṇan Sūryadēva-bhaṭṭan of Kāśyapagōtra and a resident of Tirunaṟaiyūr, for maintaining a perpetual lamp to the deity Siddhīśvaram-uḍaiyār of Tirunaṟaiyūr in Tirunaṟaiyūr-nāḍu in Kulōttuṅgaśōḻa-vaḷanāḍu. The Śivabrāhmaṇas of the temple who had the right of worship for a cycle of 30 days undertook the gift and agreed to maintain the lamp from out of the interest of 120 kāśu on the gold.
The names of the Śivabrāhmaṇas are mentioned in the record.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svastiśrī . tiripuvanaccakkaravattikaḷ śrīkulottuṅka coḻa tevaṟku yāṇṭu 2 vatu miṉanāyaṟṟu pūrvapakṣattu piratamaiyum viyāḻakkiḻamaiyum peṟṟa Uttiraṭṭāti nāḷ kulottuṅka coḻavaḷanāṭṭu tirunaṟaiyūrnāṭṭu tirunaṟaiyūr Uṭaiyār citticuramuṭaiyāṟku Ivvūr kāciyappaṉ nārāyaṇan cūriyatevapaṭṭaṉ cantirātittavaṟ cellavaikkiṟa tirunantāviḷakku Oṉṟukku Upaiyamāka tiruviḷakkerikka Ikkoyil muppatu vaṭṭamuṅ kāṇiyumuṭaiya civappirāmaṇar kāciyapaṉ paramicura muṭaiyāṉ Āṭkoṇṭa nāyakapaṭṭaṉum pāratāyan maturāntakatevaṉ Āṭaviṭaṅkapaṭṭaṉu
m Āttiraiyaṉ peruntiruvāḷan Irācapaṭṭaṉum Āttiraiyaṉ nampi tillaināyaka paṭṭaṉum Āttiraiyaṉ Uruṭṭiyacevaṭi nāṟpatteṇṇāyira paṭṭaṉum Āttiraiyaṉ civantavaṉanāyakan citticuramuṭaiyāṉum mokiliyaṉ mātevaṉ Eḻuṉūṟṟuvapaṭṭaṉum Āttiraiyaṉ tirucciṟṟampalamuṭaiyāṉ tevāṇṭāṉāṉaṉu pavittiṟa Irācarācapaṭṭaṉum Āttiraiyaṉ Ampalatti luṟaintāṉ tiruvalañcuḻiyuṭaiyāṉum Ivvaṉaivom Upaiyaṅkoṇṭa paricāvatu . Ittiru nantāviḷakku Oṉṟukku nāḷ Oṉṟukku Eṇṇai
Uḻakkāka vanta Eṇṇai cantirātittavaṟ celuttak kaṭavatāka Ivarpakkal poṉ koṇṭu poliyūṭṭāka kaikkoṇṭa kācu nūṟṟirupatukkum Ittirunantāviḷakku cantirātittavaṟ cella Erikkak kaṭavatāka nāṅkaḷ kāṇi Opātittu Ippon koṇṭu poliyūṭṭāka kaikoṇṭamaiyil Ikkoyil civappirāmaṇar kāṇi palapaṭiyāluṅ kaikkoṇṭu muṟai ceyvār nāḷopāti Ivvupaiyañ celuttak kaṭavomāka cammatittom Ivvaṉaivom . Ittanmam śrīmāheśvarar rakṣai .
Digital edition of SII 25.175 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
